title: Software Supply Chain Failure - Malicious Dependency
goal: Trigger behavior caused by an untrusted dependency.

whyVulnerable.explanation: The application used a third-party library without verifying its behavior.
whyVulnerable.answer: Dependencies can introduce hidden malicious logic.

attackFlow.answer: Supply chain attacks exploit trusted software components.

secureFix.explanation: Dependencies must be verified, pinned, and audited.
